final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a Chinese domestic fundraising roadshow PPT cover, featuring a keynote speaker.

Style/medium: professional Chinese tech industry presentation design, clean corporate visual identity with subtle tech elements, suitable for VC/PE audience
Composition: centered layout with ample negative space, speaker portrait area on upper right, title block on left, balanced for 16:9 presentation slide
Subject: keynote speaker Sam Altman in professional attire, confident executive presence, subtle tech industry gravitas
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient suggesting innovation and growth, subtle geometric patterns or circuit-inspired motifs, not distracting from content
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, professional and trustworthy atmosphere, optimistic forward-looking tone
Color palette: deep blue or tech navy as primary, gold or orange accent for energy, clean white for text legibility
Text (verbatim): "gpt5.5发布"
Constraints: must work as PowerPoint cover slide; text must be clearly readable when projected; design should appeal to Chinese GP/LP investors familiar with domestic roadshow aesthetics
Avoid: cluttered layouts; overly playful or casual elements; generic stock photo feel; excessive gradients; Western-centric visual cues that don't resonate with Chinese tech investment culture
